title: Save, prepare and store agricultural seed
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Save, prepare and store agricultural seed demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Select seed from agricultural crops

pcs.text: Calculate the quantity of seed required for future season's crops
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate the quantity of seed required for future season's crops?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate the quantity of seed required for future season's crops.

pcs.text: Calculate the area of crop needed to produce the required quantity of seed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate the area of crop needed to produce the required quantity of seed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate the area of crop needed to produce the required quantity of seed.

pcs.text: Select a portion of current crop to be used as future crop seed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select a portion of current crop to be used as future crop seed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select a portion of current crop to be used as future crop seed.

pcs.text: Check and record the soil type in selected portion of crop
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and record the soil type in selected portion of crop?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and record the soil type in selected portion of crop.

pcs.text: Identify equipment to be used in seed movement, testing and storage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify equipment to be used in seed movement, testing and storage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify equipment to be used in seed movement, testing and storage.

pcs.text: Implement measures to improve seed and plant health, vigour and uniformity within the selected area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement measures to improve seed and plant health, vigour and uniformity within the selected area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement measures to improve seed and plant health, vigour and uniformity within the selected area.

pcs.text: Identify treatments required for crop and subsequent detrimental environmental impact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify treatments required for crop and subsequent detrimental environmental impact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify treatments required for crop and subsequent detrimental environmental impact.

pcs.text: Implement workplace health, safety and biosecurity policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement workplace health, safety and biosecurity policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement workplace health, safety and biosecurity policies and procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Select seed from agricultural crops

elements.title: Evaluate and grade seed

pcs.text: Assess grain variety for its location, soil, and current workplace marketing requirements' suitability following harvest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess grain variety for its location, soil, and current workplace marketing requirements' suitability following harvest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess grain variety for its location, soil, and current workplace marketing requirements' suitability following harvest.

pcs.text: Research information regarding new varieties or trial results for input into management decision-making
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research information regarding new varieties or trial results for input into management decision-making?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research information regarding new varieties or trial results for input into management decision-making.

pcs.text: Grade the seed to the required size
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Grade the seed to the required size?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Grade the seed to the required size.

pcs.text: Apply fungicidal and insecticidal dressings to the seed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply fungicidal and insecticidal dressings to the seed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply fungicidal and insecticidal dressings to the seed according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Collect, prepare and forward test samples according to laboratory procedures and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect, prepare and forward test samples according to laboratory procedures and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect, prepare and forward test samples according to laboratory procedures and industry standards.

pcs.text: Collect and maintain records, and report outcomes according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and maintain records, and report outcomes according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and maintain records, and report outcomes according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Evaluate and grade seed

elements.title: Store seed

pcs.text: Select and prepare facilities for hygienic storage of seed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare facilities for hygienic storage of seed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare facilities for hygienic storage of seed.

pcs.text: Transfer seed to storage facility according to workplace and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transfer seed to storage facility according to workplace and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transfer seed to storage facility according to workplace and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Ensure seed is stored under conditions that maintain quality, viability and purity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure seed is stored under conditions that maintain quality, viability and purity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure seed is stored under conditions that maintain quality, viability and purity.

pcs.text: Check seed in long-term storage for quality factors and viability according to schedule specified in seed storage program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check seed in long-term storage for quality factors and viability according to schedule specified in seed storage program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check seed in long-term storage for quality factors and viability according to schedule specified in seed storage program.

pcs.text: Collect, prepare and forward seed samples for laboratory testing and analysis according to laboratory and sampling procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect, prepare and forward seed samples for laboratory testing and analysis according to laboratory and sampling procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect, prepare and forward seed samples for laboratory testing and analysis according to laboratory and sampling procedures.

pcs.text: Create and maintain records of seed storage, tests and inspections according to seed storage program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Create and maintain records of seed storage, tests and inspections according to seed storage program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Create and maintain records of seed storage, tests and inspections according to seed storage program.

pcs.text: Monitor condition of storage facilities using schedule and methods specified in seed storage program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor condition of storage facilities using schedule and methods specified in seed storage program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor condition of storage facilities using schedule and methods specified in seed storage program.

pcs.text: Implement corrective action to maintain seed quality and biosecurity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement corrective action to maintain seed quality and biosecurity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement corrective action to maintain seed quality and biosecurity.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Store seed

elements.title: Collect and deliver seed

pcs.text: Collect or deliver seed according to agreed terms and conditions and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect or deliver seed according to agreed terms and conditions and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect or deliver seed according to agreed terms and conditions and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Ensure seed sold or purchased conforms to local State and Federal legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure seed sold or purchased conforms to local State and Federal legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure seed sold or purchased conforms to local State and Federal legislative and regulatory requirements.
